{{CargoRelic
|name=Ancient Colored Shell
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=[[Species_Device#Goldfish_Altar|Goldfish Altar]]
|description=Ancient Colored Shell comes from a shellfish raised by the Goldfish through a secret technique. In addition to its natural, exquisite shape and wonderful colors, it is also unimaginably hard. Even high-tech weapons can't scratch its surface. The impregnability forced researchers yo abort composition analysis, and it was able to leave the lab and become part of the snail's collection.
|fame=14
|art=15
|fth=31
|civ=13
|tech=17
|ss1=Against Goldfish, Troop Casualty -1%
|ss2=Against Goldfish, Troop Casualty -2%
|ss3=Against Goldfish, Troop Casualty -3%
}}

[[Category:Goldfish]]
[[Category:Troop Casualty Reduction]]
